description.value:
Receive Prescription processing variabele-hoeveelheid-en-maximum building blocks for patient G. XXX_Hemsbergen
For more info: https://informatiestandaarden.nictiz.nl/wiki/mp:V3.0.0_testgegevens_afhandelen_voorschrift_ontvangen
Original description: TEST Scenarioset 6 Variabele hoeveelheid en maximum Variabele hoeveelheid en maximum
Receive Prescription processing variabele-hoeveelheid-en-maximum resources in a transaction Bundle
Test server to handle a Bundle of type transaction.
Checks if all resources specified by the scenario can be identified unambiguously.

expression.value: Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationDispense).where((( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '874965') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '42773') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '23086') ))).count() = 1

Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationDispense).where((( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '874965') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '42773') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '23086') ))).where((quantity.value = 120)).count() = 1

description.value: Confirm that the response Bundle contains 1 Medication resource that contains code '874965|urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.4.7' (CODEINEFOSFAAT PCH TABLET 10MG)
